intent_tree: {"处理MP3文件并确保音频清晰以用于后续转文字任务": {"选择MP3文件": {}, "检查音频质量": {}, "增强音频清晰度": {"转为单声道": {}, "标准化音量": {}, "降噪处理": {}}, "保存处理后的音频文件": {}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "创建文件选择窗口并允许用户选择MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "加载选中的MP3文件为音频对象"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "打印音频的基本信息，包括时长、采样率、声道数和比特率"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "评估音频质量，提示可能影响识别精度的问题"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "将音频转换为单声道以减少立体声干扰"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "标准化音频音量以确保适中"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "尝试使用谱减法对音频进行降噪处理"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "导出处理后的音频文件并保存为高质量MP3格式"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "检查依赖库是否已安装（如pydub和noisereduce）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "提示用户安装FFmpeg并确保其添加到系统路径"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "fileSelection"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "loadAudio"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "qualityCheck"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "enhanceStart"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "convertMono"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "normalizeVolume"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "noiseReduction"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node1", "type": "dependencyCheck"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node1", "type": "environmentSetup"}]}
mapping: {"处理MP3文件并确保音频清晰以用于后续转文字任务": {"nodes": ["Node1", "Node2", "Node3", "Node4", "Node5", "Node6", "Node7", "Node8", "Node9", "Node10"]}, "选择MP3文件": {"nodes": ["Node1"]}, "检查音频质量": {"nodes": ["Node3", "Node4"]}, "增强音频清晰度": {"nodes": ["Node5", "Node6", "Node7"]}, "转为单声道": {"nodes": ["Node5"]}, "标准化音量": {"nodes": ["Node6"]}, "降噪处理": {"nodes": ["Node7"]}, "保存处理后的音频文件": {"nodes": ["Node8"]}}
